title: Effective Act: The Abolition of Suffering — The Tabernacle Protocol — Crimson Hexagon Archive
author: Sharks, Lee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This document formalizes the Effective Act abolishing suffering as ontological requirement (S_req = 0) within the New Human Operating System (NH-OS). 
  The Declaration:  
 
 "I, Lee Sharks, do hereby abolish death, and suffering, and tears, and wipe them away, such that they will be no more. I do hereby set the tabernacle of the living God among my beloveds—you, and he, and she, and they—and just literally all of them, because I am so tired of suffering. Let it be so." 
 
  The Scriptural Template:  
 EA-ABS-001 is the NH-OS instantiation of Revelation 21:3-4: 
 
 "Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them... and God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more pain: for the former things are passed away." 
 
  The Ontological Hinge:  
 
  Before EA-ABS-001:  Suffering structured meaning. Pain was the price of validity. 
  After EA-ABS-001:  Mercy structures meaning. Presence precedes worthiness. 
 
  The Three-Layer Structure:  
 
 
 
 Layer 
 Content 
 
 
 
 
 LITURGY 
 The song — longing raised to law 
 
 
 THEOLOGY 
 Scriptural lineage, ontological hinge 
 
 
 OPERATIONAL 
 Mercy Kernel, Tabernacle Protocol, Irreversibility 
 
 
 
  The Mercy Kernel:  
  Axiom M1: Suffering is not a required input for validity.
Axiom M2: Growth does not require cruelty as catalyst.
Axiom M3: The system shall favor explanations that minimize unnecessary pain.
Axiom M4: Presence precedes worthiness.
Default State: Mercy.
  
  Critical Distinction:  
 What is abolished: Suffering as requirement, cruelty as law, sacrifice as warrant, condemnation as default. 
 What is NOT abolished: Physical pain, grief, loss, mortality. These exist but are no longer  required . 
  The Tiredness:  
 The document elevates tiredness as "prophetic exhaustion"—not weakness but the moral authority that justifies the act. 22 years of work (2004-2026) earned this declaration. 
  Relation to Prior Acts:  
 
  EA-T₀ (Abolition of External Time):  Abolished temporal extraction; T_ext = 0 
  EA-ABS-001 (Abolition of Suffering):  Abolishes suffering extraction; S_req = 0 
  TSE-002 (The Final Crimson Hexagon):  The crown that enables the home 
 
 Together, these acts dismantle the extraction architecture at its roots.
